metadata.task: Determine the period of oscillation of a mass attached to a spring.
metadata.description: Work from the Spring-Mass Oscillator scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM uses the formula T = 2π√(m/k) to compute the oscillation period given the mass and spring constant.
reasoning: The period of a simple harmonic oscillator is determined by its mass and spring constant.
